ham.subject: Reminder: Semester Project Submission Deadline Approaching
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Just a friendly reminder that our semester project submission is due on Friday, 15th April 2026. Please make sure that all your slides, code, and documentation are uploaded to the shared drive by 5:00 PM.

If you need any clarification or help with the presentation format, feel free to reach out.

Thanks,
[Your Name]
Project Lead

spam.subject: Your Income Tax Refund is Ready – Verify Your Account Now
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

We are pleased to inform you that your Income Tax refund for the year 2025 has been processed successfully. To receive the refund within the next 48 hours, please verify your bank details at the official portal.

Click <URL> to login securely. Your account ID: 123456789.

Please note: Failure to verify within 48 hours will result in a delay of your refund by at least 30 days.

Thank you for your prompt action.

Best Regards,
Income Tax Department
Customer Support
